1.content:
You are sitting around in the library, hoping for something to distract you from this assignment. Why did you choose to study Education anyway? Out of the blue, you begin to feel light headed. Nothing new to you, you’re probably just studying to hard. You begin to pack away your laptop, charger and notes when the room begins to spin and you black out.

Coming to, your eyes jolt back and forth across the room. You understand you’re in the library, but everything is much, much bigger then it used to be. You look up to see a guy walking past to head downstairs. Wait, can it be? Have I shrunk? But why?

Without anytime to think, you look up to see...

James, 19, tall, skinny but muscular, brown hair, green eyes, has a nice semi flat ass and has huge feet. He studies Engineering, this is his 2nd year. Socially awkward at times.

Noah, 19, average height, kinda built, brown hair, brown eyes, beautiful bubble butt and average feet. He studies Medicine, this is his 2nd year. Loves his work outs, early morning hikes, swims and bike riding.

Rhys, 18, average height, skinny, blond hair, blue eyes, a nice butt. average feet. He studies Exercise Physiology, this is his 1st year. Loves his Cricket A true Australian bogan.

132.content:
It’s Noah, you’re medicine friend who’s here flys into town every year to study. He lives down south with his parents, 3 brothers and girlfriend. He is a pretty outstanding lad. Sure, you don’t get along all the time and you both can get on each others nerves but he’s there for you and that’s what counts.

You begin to jump and scream, hoping to get his attention. Like if you had to shrink anywhere, the Library couches are the last place to do that. The area is always so busy and you basically can’t get up from your seat without 5 other people wanting to take your place.

“Noah, down here. Help me I... I don’t know what’s happened.” You scream at the top of your lungs.

But your cry’s for help fall on deaf ears. He haven’t noticed you and he wants in on the comfy seat you currently occupy. As he bends forward his sports shorts part to show you the true depth of his ass crack. You’ve always admired his bubble butt but never really wanted to be in it, well not at this size anyway. Without a second to react, his shorts and ass crash into you.

You are surprised that he somehow hasn’t killed you. You can’t move yourself but it seems that this shrinking has made you pliable. That still doesn’t help with the fact that you have had all the air pressed out of your lungs. His cheeks had spread when his ass hit the seat and you are now pressed between his shorts and the fabric of the couch.

‘Fuck, what am I going to do? How am I still alive?’ You think to yourself.

After a few minutes the sweat from Noah’s butt crack has started to seep into his shorts, the smell is rancid and you can’t do anything but wish for death. You can begin to taste it now and you can and choke on it. If only you could wheeze in a small breath of fresh air then this toxic hell hole wouldn’t be such a bad place.

After what feels like forever you feel Noah get up. As the weight ascends, you begin to gasp for fresh air. All that joy is short lived as you realise that you are not on the chair but are indeed stuck to the back of Noah’s Shorts, right in his crack.

As Noah goes to leave he catches a glimpse of Jim, the guy that runs a club on Campus that you and Noah are apart of. Noah strides up to Jim before beginning to make conversation.

Meanwhile you are reforming and beginning to look more humanly shaped rather than the pancake you represented for the past hour. You thrash around hoping he notices you. ‘How have I shrink?’ You think to yourself.

15.title: Nothing But The Roof

info.brief_description: You are a guy, living his life as a student when you shrink. How will the story play out?
info.description:
Your name is Dylan, you are a 19 year old university student. You are surrounded by your friends almost all the time. Today you were sitting in the university library trying to cram for an assignment when you begin to feel strange when you suddenly shrink.

Rules

1. This is a man only story, no female characters that involve any form of macrophilia

2. Please keep the vore at a minimum.

3. Dylan can not die. The shrinking somehow made his body morphable. It will always come back to it’s current shape.

4. If you regrow back, be sure to shrink yourself quickly.
